title: Columns batch actions
excerpt:
Hi! 
It would be amazing if we could select multiple columns by clicking in a box, like we do for items batch actions. This way we could move’em, delete’em in batches, setup permissions for visualization / edition in a f…

posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

It would be amazing if we could select multiple columns by clicking in a box, like we do for items batch actions. This way we could move’em, delete’em in batches, setup permissions for visualization / edition in a faster way.

It’s really time consuming to setup (or move) individual columns when we have a big board.

Could you implement that for us?

Best regards

posts.author: i.moreno (Ignacio Moreno Ortega [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!,
I am part of the Decadis team and I would like to recommend you our application, Batch Hero for monday

In particular, to the section of the Column operations. These operations can be used to Add , copy , or delete columns effortlessly, saving you precious time and streamlining your project organization.

If you need assistance on how to use the application, please, feel free to create a request in our support portal , we will be happy to help you.

Best regards,
Nacho
